title: Case study — Ask BC
summary: BigCommerce knowledge agent. Hybrid: Next.js on Vercel handles OAuth + admin shell; agent runtime runs in a Cloudflare Worker as a Durable Object per store. Read tools execute inside Codemode sandbox; write tools require two-turn confirmation gate. Subdomain: askbc.ninochavez.co.

strategy.decision: Second commerce-bc deep-dive — ask-bc is the most ambitious agentic-software architecture in the cluster. Five compositions: hero (with live subdomain pill) → schematic (ask-bc-hybrid-arch: Vercel admin + CF Worker DO + Codemode sandbox + write-gate) → approach (hybrid-host rationale, per-store Durable Object isolation, read/write tool split) → quotable (the architecture decision quote) → outcome.
strategy.why: ADR-0009 cluster IA lists ask-bc as the second commerce-bc deep-dive. Its hybrid architecture is genuinely differentiated — most chat tools are single-stack; ask-bc's split (Vercel OAuth + CF Worker agent + Codemode sandbox + confirmation gate) is load-bearing for the 'context engineer instruments systems' claim.
strategy.shipped: v2 /work/ask-bc — prose case page + subdomain link.
strategy.gap: Proposed = nested route + hybrid-arch schematic + write-gate detail; Shipped = prose + subdomain link.
strategy.question: Is the subdomain askbc.ninochavez.co serving the current build? Prior HANDOFF flagged TEAM_ACCESS_REQUIRED block on Vercel deploys — still blocked? If so, mark '(redeploying)' on the hero pill.

currentState.annotation: Route nests under commerce-bc. Hybrid-arch schematic introduced. Verify subdomain deploy status before ship.
